case_title: CLARK, REX J (RESPONDENT) vs. PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES (APPELLANT)

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, REX J  (RESPONDENT) AS TO DEFENDANT PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES, A PARTNERSHIP 0F MOLLY MCGUIRE, DEE BUSCH, FRED BUSCH
THE FILING FEE IN 151949, $88.00, WAS PAID BY DEFENDANT, APPELLANT PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES.
NOTICE OF REPRESENTATION OF RESPONDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, REX J  (RESPONDENT)
JUDGE RAYMOND ARATA, K.LEE/CLERK, L.NAJERA/CSR 10:00AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ANNE HIPSHMAN FOR THE PLTF. NEIL HELFMAN FOR THE DEFT. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES, A PARTNERSHIP 0F MOLLY MCGUIRE, DEE BUSCH, FRED BUSCH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, PLUS COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.
